summary_en: Upper limit 6.5M shares (4.05% of outstanding), ¥36.0B, execution window May 15, 2026–Feb 26, 2027 via open-market purchase (委託) and ToSTNeT-3. Concurrent cancellation of 4.5M shares (2.72% of pre-cancellation outstanding) effective May 29, 2026. Acquisition rationale: capital efficiency and shareholder return aligned with updated mid-term plan (TBS Group Mid-Term Plan 2026 Update); total return payout ratio to be managed opportunistically.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Treasury Share Acquisition and Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, TBS Holdings' board authorized treasury share acquisition and concurrent cancellation. The acquisition targets a maximum of 6.5 million shares (4.05% of outstanding) for up to ¥36.0 billion, to be executed between May 15, 2026 and February 26, 2027 via two methods: (1) discretionary (委託) purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, and (2) off-exchange block trades (ToSTNeT-3). Separately, the board resolved to cancel 4.5 million shares (2.72% of pre-cancellation outstanding) effective May 29, 2026. The company stated that treasury acquisition responds to its updated mid-term plan (TBS Group Mid-Term Plan 2026 Update), which emphasizes sustained growth investment and enhanced capital efficiency. Shareholder return is identified as a key management priority, with treasury acquisitions to be executed opportunistically while maintaining awareness of total return payout ratio. Execution is subject to investment opportunities and market conditions.
